title: ononis crispa subsp. zschackei
intro: Ononis crispa subsp. zschackei, also known as the Spurred Restharrow, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The Spurred Restharrow has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health issues.
